hero.subtitle: <bold>Create</bold> or <bold>join squads</bold>, fill your squad, and get a Discord invite the second your team is ready.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before building your squad.

items.question: Is Squadzr free?
items.answer: Yes, 100% free. No credit card required, no premium plans. Just sign in with your Discord account and start playing.

items.question: Do I need to create an account?
items.answer: You sign in with your Discord account in one click — no forms, no extra passwords. Your Discord avatar and username are your identity on Squadzr.

items.question: How many squads can I create?
items.answer: There is no limit. You can create as many squads as you want, for any game available on the platform.

items.question: When is the Discord link shared?
items.answer: The Discord server invite is shared as soon as the squad reaches its max player count. When the last slot is filled, all members get access to the invite link.

items.question: What happens if the host leaves?
items.answer: If the squad creator leaves, the squad is closed and all members are removed. Regular members can leave without affecting the squad.

items.question: Can I choose the number of players?
items.answer: Yes. By default, the player count matches the selected game's max players, but you can customize it between 2 and 20 when creating a squad.

items.question: What games are supported?
items.answer: We currently support 19 popular games including League of Legends, Valorant, CS2, Dota 2, Fortnite, Overwatch 2, and more. The list is constantly updated.

items.question: Can I join a squad by code?
items.answer: Yes. Every squad has a unique 6-character code that can be shared. Just enter the code to join the squad directly.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
